query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, modelOverOdds, modelUnderOdds, modelOverRate, modelUnderRate, modelTotal, bookTotal, overOdds, underOdds, awayRunLine, awayRunLineOdds, homeRunLine, homeRunLineOdds, awayML, homeML, modelRunAt FROM games WHERE gameDate = '2026-05-13' AND sport = 'MLB' AND awayTeam = 'ARI';
